violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Gasket cracked/damaged at fries hopper.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Residue at front interior door of ice machine and minimal debris at edge of interior panel brackets.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Spill at top surface of ice cream machine. -Debris/splatter at outlets on right side of flat top grill. -Debris/residue at interior surfaces of blue (donation) bins in walk in freezer. -Ketchup/debris in cabinets below public self serve dispensers.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Dirty dishes placed on clean side drain board. *Corrected on site - moved to dirty side and sanitizer sink drained for refresh.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Ware wash machine "bell" was broken off machine this morning by service rep. Part ordered and will be fixed ASAP. Recomended draining machine and turning off unit until fixed to prevent more issues. ***Facility is manually washing dishes at the 3 compartment sink until repaired.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Black food bin (used for egg mix) stored at top shelf of walk in freezer is not stored inverted or covered.
Laundering of linens. — --Aprons are washed on-site but are not mechanically dried. They are hung on the corner of a shelf rack to air dry between uses.

Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. "Clean cloths" basket used for cloths after washing. *Wet cloths must be returned to sanitizer solution or mechanically dried after washing.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Shake station refrigerator door as remnant of plastic seal under door handle.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Gasket is cracked/damaged at fry hopper door.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dust debris at walk in cooler fans. -Splatter residue at side of dispensers at server/drive through service area. -Residue build up at shake rinse station.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Cases of fries dill season shaker bags stored on floor at drive through register and front register.
Linen storage. — --Wet cloths left in washer, were not placed into sanitizer solution at end of cycle. *Recommended a rewash before transfer to sani solution.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
